differences.fix_suggestion: Fix explicit SolidWorks DisplayDim persistence until every required reference-intent target survives SaveAs, Close/Reopen, post-layout repair, and export.
Fix the generator so post_layout_final has no DisplayDim floor gap and no missing reference-intent target keys before accepting the drawing.

generated_png_source_evidence.acceptance_rule: For LB26001-A-04-006/007/008/009/015/022, Drawing Review UI evidence must use the generated PNG from the current run_dir; stale drw_output/v5 images are diagnostic only.

differences.fix_suggestion: Use the application Drawing Review UI to screenshot and judge this drawing against the reference before acceptance.
Align view placement, titlebar, notes, and coarse ink layout with the same-name reference.
Correct the drawing against the same-name reference before accepting the staged case.
